# API Contracts Checklist: PR Blast-Radius Review Action

**Purpose**: Validate requirements quality for the reusable action contract, detector result mapping, sticky-comment report contract, and public outputs.
**Created**: 2026-07-15
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md), [plan.md](../plan.md), [contracts/action-contract.md](../contracts/action-contract.md), [contracts/result-matrix.md](../contracts/result-matrix.md), [contracts/report-contract.md](../contracts/report-contract.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 Are all public action inputs documented with defaults, requiredness, and detector mappings? [Completeness, Spec FR-024, Contract action-contract]
- [x] CHK002 Are all public action outputs documented with allowed values and consumer meaning? [Completeness, Spec FR-025, Contract action-contract]
- [x] CHK003 Are detector statuses and exit codes fully mapped to final action conclusions? [Completeness, Spec FR-040-FR-045, Contract result-matrix]
- [x] CHK004 Are report sections and required metadata defined for every delivery surface? [Completeness, Spec FR-002, FR-038, Contract report-contract]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK005 Is the caller-threshold input mapping to `callers>N` unambiguous? [Clarity, Spec FR-026]
- [x] CHK006 Is hub-threshold enablement defined without inventing a second policy engine? [Clarity, Spec FR-026]
- [x] CHK007 Is ordinary impact explicitly distinguished from action failure despite detector exit code 1? [Clarity, Spec FR-040-FR-042]
- [x] CHK008 Is the action-owned hidden marker requirement clear enough to prevent unrelated comment edits? [Clarity, Spec FR-004-FR-005, Contract report-contract]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK009 Do spec, data model, and contracts use the same names for summary status, detector exit code, delivery status, cache status, narrative status, and final conclusion? [Consistency, Spec FR-025, Data Model]
- [x] CHK010 Do action outputs align with the result matrix and report contract without conflicting conclusion names? [Consistency, Contracts action-contract/result-matrix/report-contract]
- [x] CHK011 Do sticky-comment requirements align with the one-current-report user story and duplicate recovery policy? [Consistency, Spec US1, FR-034-FR-038]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK012 Are success criteria measurable for action contract observability and result-matrix fixtures? [Acceptance Criteria, Spec SC-010, SC-014]
- [x] CHK013 Are report-contract requirements traceable to user-visible review outcomes rather than implementation mechanics only? [Traceability, Spec US1, Contract report-contract]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [x] CHK014 Are SPEC-012 detector dependencies documented as canonical inputs rather than reimplemented behavior? [Dependency, Spec Assumptions, Plan Research]
